supersedes: revision 1, whose VALID PASS was rejected by docs/CRITIC-REVIEW-09-CODEX.md
honesty_notes: N=20 is a MECHANISM determination, NOT a failure-rate bound (20/20 bounds the rate only at <14% @95%). See docs/BAKEOFF-PREDECLARATION.md §1.2.
ps_buckets.last_op is a per-bucket op cursor, NOT the protocol's checkpoint_complete message. Advancement + row materialisation is the oracle.

Scope: one-row ordinary transactions, one project, good network, iOS simulator, debug build. Streaming of large in-progress transactions, two-phase commit, parallel apply, bucket compaction and service restarts are NOT exercised — so 'structural immunity' is NOT established.
